_schema.description: Frequency dataset. Each category gets a row of tally marks — groups of 5 (four vertical marks slashed by a diagonal). The chart resembles a histogram once marks are totalled. Best for discrete counts of 5–60; above that, a histogram is clearer.

fields.title: string — chart headline
fields.unit: string — what each tally mark represents
fields.period: string — time period or context label
fields.categories[].label: string — row label (displayed on left axis)
fields.categories[].count: number — integer count (each unit becomes one tally mark)

_schema.replace: Swap categories[] with your data. Counts should be positive integers. Keep totals under ~60 per row for readability; above that, aggregate into a histogram instead.
